label: Data table
description: The VISUAL that renders a record set as generic sortable columns and rows (accessible DOM) with per-column rendering and an optional footer — a canvas made specific. Binds to a record set via `source`, or takes inline columns/rows.

params.label: Record set
params.description: Id of the record set to render (binds the visual to a data structure); omit to supply columns/rows inline.

params.label: Columns
params.description: Display columns: key, label, alignment, and render.

params.label: Rows
params.description: One object per row (inline, when not bound to a source).
